purpose: Ω-cycle: refresh cross-repo atlas absorption since 2026-04-25 — capture 24+ hour delta in anima/hexa-lang/n6-architecture beyond the original 2026-04-26 absorption shards.
trigger: User request — original shards may be stale after 24+ hours of activity in source repos.
policy: raw 73 admissibility — every absorbed fact independently verifiable via file:line citation
raw 77 audit-append-only — no mutations to source repos (anima/hexa-lang/n6-architecture)
raw 70 verify-axes — each fact has at least one source axis cited
raw 12 honest scope — quality threshold (load-bearing claim, theorem, paradigm shift, or measured value) — no bulk imports

absorb_candidates_high_value: GWT registry r6 progression r2→r6 (4/5→8/8 backbones, Meta APPROVED Llama mirror)
skip_candidates: anima-speak/corpus/*.wav (audio samples, not absorbable as atlas facts)

absorb_candidates_high_value: tool/load_balancer.hexa (3 strategies, ai-native algo, raw-format DSL state)
tool/spawn_lint.hexa (4 forbidden orphan idioms — Plan B Phase 4)

skip_candidates: 232 commits dominantly KR→EN translate + own#1 allowlist shrink (1-entry-at-a-time churn) — not load-bearing facts

anima_cont.fact_breakdown: 4 @C constants + 6 @F formulas/verdicts + 2 @R joint relations + 3 @P primitives + 1 @S symmetry + caveats inline

load_bearing_examples: @P hexa_runner_image_caps = cpus=4 mem=4g (only safe execution surface vs darwin)
@C raw_omega_saturation_pair = raw#37 plan + raw#38 impl (paired Ω-cycle)

cross_shard_collision_check.sentinel: __ATLAS_CROSS_SHARD_COLLISION__ PASS shards=10 total=9155 unique=9155 dup=0 conflict=0

fixpoint_marker.rationale: Ω-cycle complete: delta surveyed → 25 ABSORB candidates identified across 3 repos → 3 continuation shards written (45 atlas facts total, all source-cited) → cross-shard collision check PASS 0/0. Original 4 shards (309 facts) + 3 cont shards (45 facts) = 354 total absorbed facts from 4-repo trawl.
fixpoint_marker.next_cycle_trigger: Next significant activity wave in any source repo (>=20 commits or >=5 new design docs)

honesty_caveats: anima 376-file delta is large but ~280 of those are .wav corpus (audio samples) — those skip per quality threshold.
anima 160 commits skewed heavily to GWT registry r2→r6 + Mk.XI r9 progression — captured as a few load-bearing constants, not commit-by-commit.
hexa-lang Plan B implementation is mid-rollout (Phase 1-4 specs landed; runtime integration pending) — captured as architecture-level @P/@F facts, not impl-level.
n6-architecture 232 commits dominantly KR→EN translate churn (1 entry per commit) — captured as own_phase6_allowlist_baseline=235 single anchor; per-translation entries not absorbed.
Mk.XI V_sub=1867 marked PASS_UNREALISTIC in shard (mock corpus collapse) — preserves source raw#10 honesty.
